title: dodecatheon pulchellum var. zionense
intro: Dodecatheon pulchellum var. zionense, also known as Zion shootingstar, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides. The health benefits of Dodecatheon pulchellum var. zionense include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tincture, salve, or infusible herb, and is often combined with other herbs to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions and injuries.
